_comment: 技能伤害补充/强化表。用于追加自动表没有覆盖的强化普攻、强化技能、额外伤害等条目。
_usage: skills 内每项格式与 localConfig.json 的 skills 基本一致；同一英雄技能建议保持唯一 id，并写清 source/sourceNote。
policy: 补充强化普攻、强化技能和额外伤害条目；不覆盖 pypy-vrc/er-gamedata 已有结构化伤害；俞岷保持手动规则。

skills.title: W 极电释放 额外伤害
skills.description: When recast, or at max duration, Aiden deals 40(+48% Attack Power) ~ 80(+90% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies nearby based on charge time and slows them by 45% for 0 | 5 seconds, dealing 50(+50% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies that touch it and rooting them for 0
skills.coefficientText: (+48% Attack Power) | (+90% Attack Power) | (+50% Attack Power)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: W 巴比伦魔方 额外伤害
skills.description: Babylon's Cube deals 60(+40% Skill Amp) skill damage and slows enemies in the area by 50% for 0 |  After 1 seconds, the Babylon's Cube disappears, dealing 50(+65% Skill Amp) skill damage and stunning enemies in the area for 1 seconds
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: Q 致瘸射击 强化伤害
skills.description: Bernice fires an expanded projectile from his gun, dealing 60(+100% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies hit |  Rooted enemies take 90(+100% Attack Power) skill damage and are slowed by 30% for 1
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: Q 血之枪 额外伤害
skills.description: Bianca throws a spear of blood to the targeted location, dealing 40(+50% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies hit |  The javelin forms a pool of blood on arrival, dealing 10(+50% Skill Amp)(+8% of target’s max HP) skill damage to the first enemy that touches it
skills.coefficientText: (+50% Skill Amp) | (+8% of target’s max HP)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: R 血族女皇的契约 额外伤害
skills.description: After the incantation is complete, the circle sticks to the ground, dealing 50(+45% Skill Amp)(+11% of enemy max HP) skill damage to enemies in range |  The spell then explodes, dealing 50(+70% Skill Amp)~100(+140% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies in range based on their missing HP, and heals Bianca for 100(+50% Skill Amp)(+10% of missing HP)
skills.coefficientText: (+45% Skill Amp) | (+70% Skill Amp) | (+140% Skill Amp) | (+50% Skill Amp) | (+11% of enemy max HP) | (+10% of missing HP)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: R 血族女皇的契约 Maximum Extra Damage
skills.description: After the incantation is complete, the circle sticks to the ground, dealing 50(+45% Skill Amp)(+11% of enemy max HP) skill damage to enemies in range |  The spell then explodes, dealing 50(+70% Skill Amp)~100(+140% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies in range based on their missing HP, and heals Bianca for 100(+50% Skill Amp)(+10% of missing HP)
skills.coefficientText: (+45% Skill Amp) | (+70% Skill Amp) | (+140% Skill Amp) | (+50% Skill Amp) | (+11% of enemy max HP) | (+10% of missing HP)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: W 截断 强化伤害
skills.description: Enemies hit by the inner range take 30(+70% Skill Amp) skill damage but do not receive stacks of Wounded |  Enemies hit by the outer range take 50(+90% Skill Amp) skill damage and are slowed by 30% for 2 seconds
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: E 缝合 额外伤害
skills.description: Cathy throws her suture thread, dealing 50(+40% Skill Amp) skill damage to the first enemy hit and rooting them for 0 |  Sutures that hit a second target push the initial target towards the second target, dealing 30(+50% Skill Amp) extra skill damage and stunning them for 1 |  Sutures that hit a wall push the enemy into the wall, dealing 30(+65% Skill Amp) extra damage and stunning them for 0 |  Damage from the suture does not apply stacks of Wounded
skills.coefficientText: (+40% Skill Amp) | (+50% Skill Amp) | (+65% Skill Amp)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: Q 暗之洗礼 额外伤害
skills.description: Chiara shoots out corrupted energy, dealing 60(+70% Skill Amp) skill damage |  Hitting with corrupted energy several times deals an additional 10(+8% Skill Amp) skill damage per hit, starting from the second hit
skills.coefficientText: (+70% Skill Amp) | (+8% Skill Amp) | (+5% Skill Amp) | (10 HP per Hand of Corruption hit)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: E 深渊枷锁 额外伤害
skills.description: Chiara sends out a shackle in the targeted direction, dealing 50(+40% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies hit and linking them to Chiara |  If the link is maintained for 2 seconds, she deals 40(+70% Skill Amp) skill damage and roots the enemy for 1
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: P 人偶师 [Nina] Enhanced Attack Damage
skills.description: Hitting an enemy by 2 or more of Chloe’s basic attacks causes Nina's next attack to deal 20(+50% Nina Attack Power) extra skill damage to the target
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: Q 剪影 强化伤害
skills.description: Daniel manifests ghastly scissors in the targeted location, dealing 30(+110% Attack Power) skill damage |  Hitting an enemy with the middle of the blades deals 40(+130% Attack Power) skill damage, slowing enemies by 30% for 1
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: W 光之旋涡 额外伤害
skills.description: Eva forms a Phase Vortex in the targeted location, dealing 40(+45% Skill Amp) skill damage |  The vortex collapses after 1 seconds, dealing 40(+40% Skill Amp) skill damage and launching enemies in the middle airborne for 1 second
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: R VF觉醒 额外伤害
skills.description: Eva releases her stored VF, dealing 5(+5% Skill Amp) skill damage and applying a stack of VF Dissonance every 0 |  Upon reaching 5 stacks, Eva consumes the stacks, dealing 30(+30% Skill Amp) skill damage
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: Q 观测 [Variable] Enhanced Damage
skills.description: Istvan lunges his spear, dealing 40(+100% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies | 75 seconds and dealing 40(+100% Attack Power) skill damage |  He deals 100(+200% Attack Power) damage to enemies with less than 20% HP
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: W 断筋 强化普攻额外伤害
skills.description: Jackie's next basic attack is enhanced, dealing 10(+20% Extra Attack Power) aditional skill damage and slowing targets by 60% for 0,85 seconds

skills.title: Q 膝踢 强化伤害
skills.description: Knee Strike : Jan attacks with his knee, dealing 10(+65% Extra Attack Power)(+50% Skill Amp)(+Enemy's Max HP 6%) skill damage to enemies in range and slowing them by 50% for 1 seconds |  Leaping Knee : Jan attacks with his knee, dealing 65(+90% Extra Attack Power)(+80% Skill Amp)(+Enemy's Max HP 6%) skill damage and knocking them airborne for 0
skills.coefficientText: (+50% Skill Amp) | (+80% Skill Amp) | (+65% Extra Attack Power) | (+Enemy's Max HP 6%) | (+90% Extra Attack Power)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.description: Jan sweeps the area in front of him with a kick, dealing 60(+60% Extra Attack Power)(+85% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies in range |  Enhanced: Deals 100(+85% Extra Attack Power)(+100% Skill Amp) skill damage and knocks back all enemies in range
skills.coefficientText: (+85% Skill Amp) | (+100% Skill Amp) | (+60% Extra Attack Power) | (+85% Extra Attack Power)

skills.description: Jenny deals an additional 60(+58% Skill Amp) skill damage every 3 basic attacks or after activating Persona

skills.title: Q 圣光召唤 强化伤害
skills.description: When the light reaches the max distance or if the skill is reused, the light bursts, dealing 60(+Skill Amp 60%) skill damage |  When the light bursts, it deals 100(+Skill Amp 110%) skill damage and roots enemies for 0
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: E 指引的光芒 强化伤害
skills.description: The blessing deals 50(+Skill Amp 45%) skill damage to nearby enemies upon expiration |  When Transcendent Censer touches a target blessed with Divine Scripture, the skill is enhanced, granting 50(+Skill Amp 30%) shield and dealing 80(+Skill Amp 60%) additional damage for 2
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: R 青蛇 Enhanced True Damage
skills.description: Lenox quickly attacks twice in an X shape, dealing 70(+40% Skill Amp) skill damage and applying Blue Viper for 4 seconds | 23 seconds, enemies take 5 true damage depending on how far they move |  Hitting an enemy with both attacks deals 25 true damage depending on how far they move
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: R 售后服务 额外伤害
skills.description: Dealing skill damage to marked targets, deals 20(+10% Attack Power)(+ 2% Target's Max HP) additional skill damage per stack and slows them by 6% per stack for 1 seconds |  Luke jumps backward and uses his cleaning tool as an explosive, dealing 150(+80% Attack Power) to 300(+160% Attack Power) skill damage based on his lost HP to enemies within range and slowing them by 30% for 1 |  Evolved: Luke gains vision of targets that take damage from Pressure Washer for 1 seconds and slows them by 99% instead
skills.coefficientText: (+10% Attack Power) | (+ 2% Target's Max HP) | (+80% Attack Power) | (+160% Attack Power)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: W 时间轨迹 额外伤害
skills.description: Nathapon takes a Timelapse in the targeted area, dealing 40}(+25% Skill Amp) skill damage per second to enemies and slowing them by 40% |  The final photograph deals 50(+75% Skill Amp) extra skill damage and roots subjects in frame for 1
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: E 重拳 强化伤害
skills.description: Knockout Punch: Nicky throws a knockout punch in front of her, dealing 60(+80% Skill Amp) skill damage and slowing enemies by 30% for 2 seconds |  Fury Jab!!: If Guard is successful, Nicky can use Fury Jab!!, dealing 70(+100% Skill Amp) skill damage, slowing enemies by 30% for 2 seconds, and stunning them for 0
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: R 愤怒的上勾拳！ 强化伤害
skills.description: Nicky dashes to the targeted enemy player, becoming unstoppable, and uppercuts them, dealing 100(+35% Skill Amp) skill damage and knocking them airborne for 1 |  Short Tempered deals 150(+100% Skill Amp) skill damage
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: Q 狂龙乱舞&下劈 [Helicopter Spin] Enhanced Damage
skills.description: Helicopter Spin: Piolo spins his nunchaku in the targeted direction, dealing 8(+14% Skill Amp) skill damage every 0 |  Piolo deals 30(+25% Skill Amp) enhanced skill damage against enemies at 1, 5, and 10 hits |  If Helicopter Spin was cast with full duration or if it dealt enhanced skill damage 2 times, Piolo becomes able to cast Chokeslam |  Chokeslam: Piolo slams his nunchaku in the targeted direction, dealing 60(+80% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies within the inner indicator and slowing them by 60% for 1 |  Enemies within the outer indicator take 50(+60% Skill Amp) skill damage
skills.coefficientText: (+14% Skill Amp) | (+25% Skill Amp) | (+80% Skill Amp) | (+60% Skill Amp)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: W 分离 Daikyu Extra Damage
skills.description: Hankyu: Rio fires arrows in a cone shape, dealing 50(+90% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies in range |  Arrows that hit the same target multiple times deal 20% damage |  Daikyu: Rio fires a single arrow in the targeted direction, dealing 90(+80% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies hit and 45(+45% Attack Power) skill damage to enemies behind the target in a cone shape |  Damaged targets are slowed by 20% for 1 seconds
skills.coefficientText: (+90% Attack Power) | (+80% Attack Power) | (+45% Attack Power)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.title: E 箭越 Daikyu Extra Damage
skills.description: Hankyu: Rio lunges into the targeted direction, firing 3 arrows at 3 enemies in range, each dealing 10(+30% Attack Power) skill damage |  Daikyu: Rio jumps into the targeted direction, firing 1 arrow at 3 enemies in range, dealing 70(+35% Attack Power) skill damage and 20(+35% Attack Power) skill damage 2m around the target
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。

skills.description: Sua manifests a lance and flies forward, dealing 110(+55% Skill Amp) skill damage to enemies hit and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 1 seconds |  Enemies that have a bookmark take 150(+80% Skill Amp) skill damage and are knocked airborne

skills.title: R 记忆力 记忆-奥德赛
skills.description: Odyssey: Enemies hit by the book collision take 180(+80% Skill Amp) skill damage and a bookmark is attached to enemies hit for 5 seconds |  Making a new bookmark triggers the old one, dealing 50(+50% Skill Amp) skill damage and stunning enemies for 3 |  Damage to enemies at the site of the book collision is increased by 30%, and their movement speed is reduced by 50% for 1 seconds |  Curious Case: Ally cast: Sua shields her target for 80(+30% Skill Amp) damage and makes them immune to crowd control effects |  Enemy cast: Deals 50(+30% Skill Amp) damage and blinds enemies for 0 |  Don Quixote: Enemies hit take 125(+60% Skill Amp) skill damage and their movement speed is reduced by 50% for 1 seconds |  Enemies that have a bookmark take 170(+85% Skill Amp) skill damage and are knocked airborne
skills.coefficientText: (+80% Skill Amp) | (+50% Skill Amp) | (+30% Skill Amp) | (+60% Skill Amp) | (+85% Skill Amp) | (+28% Skill Amp) | (+42% Skill Amp)
skills.sourceNote: 补充强化普攻/强化技能/额外伤害归属；俞岷排除。
